channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin price-drop speculation spurred by familiar price pattern
item.description: BTC and ETH remain stuck in a two-month range as oil prices and Iran tensions weigh on sentiment, while AI and privacy tokens show surprising relative strength.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls away from software stocks as Iran war, AI reshape market dynamic
item.description: BTC correlation with an ETF tracking software comany stocks broke sharply from near-total alignment to near zero after the conflict started.

item.title: Bitcoin RSI ‘nearly perfectly’ copying end of 2022 bear market: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin stochastic RSI signals led a trader to draw key comparisons between current BTC price action and its rebound after the 2022 bear market.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Add $471M in Biggest One-Day Haul Since February
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs saw their biggest inflow in six weeks as crypto investors positioned ahead of Trump's Iran deadline.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit $471M, highest since late February
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs draw $471 million in their strongest daily inflow in weeks, while Ether funds return to gains despite cautious sentiment.

item.title: “Just one more trade” is the crypto version of “just one more level” in a video game at 2am. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE8zZVBMa0EwcERGYnBtbkM0c1ZXdmdoa25PMmwyaWRpM3hPSHRIUmg5M1Q0WDRWZlRZMnVWR093b2VUYkhNWkMtNW5TVkp5LVVISTl1SmhHYw?oc=5" target="_blank">“Just one more trade” is the crypto version of “…

item.title: SAYLOR JUST BOUGHT $330M OF BITCOIN - x.com
item.description: SAYLOR JUST BOUGHT $330M OF BITCOIN

item.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit highest level since February
item.description: Spot bitcoin ETFs pulled in $471 million on April 6, the 6th-largest inflow of 2026, as prediction markets price little near-term Fed movement.

item.title: Bitcoin’s quantum challenges are ‘more social than technical’: Grayscale
item.description: The Bitcoin community has a “history of contentious debates over protocol changes,” said Grayscale head of research Zach Pandl.

item.title: XRP slips to $1.31 after failed breakout as liquidity dries up
item.description: Rejection at $1.35 and collapsing depth raise risk of sharper moves as positioning builds.

item.title: Bitcoin miners face a new rival for cheap power as Anthropic signs multi-gigawatt compute deal
item.description: The AI company's partnership with Google and Broadcom for next-generation TPU capacity starting in 2027 adds to a wave of demand reshaping the economics of every industry that competes for cheap electricity, including bitcoin mining.

item.title: Onchain evidence was key to convicting 3 terrorism financiers: TRM Labs
item.description: One of the three convicted terrorism financiers sent $49,000 worth of stablecoins to a foreign exchange before it was routed to an ISIS-linked campaign.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana hold steady as Trump sets Tuesday night deadline for Iran deal
item.description: Oil jumped above $112 on threats to destroy Iranian infrastructure if no agreement is reached by midnight, while crypto markets gave back Monday's ceasefire rally gains.

item.title: Crypto market safe harbor lands at White House for review
item.description: The proposal includes a startup exemption, a fundraising exemption and an investment contract safe harbor for issuers.

item.title: New evidence in Libra probe renews questions about Milei involvement
item.description: New documents seen by The New York Times suggest the Argentine president had seven phone calls with the entrepreneur behind the Libra token.

item.title: Solana Foundation looks to beef up DeFi security as attacks continue
item.description: The Solana Foundation and Web3 security firm Asymmetric Research unveiled a new security initiative called STRIDE, along with a real-time incident-response network.

item.title: SEC close to putting out 'reg crypto' for fundraising questions, Chair Atkins says
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission will address fundraising and startup exemptions in this proposal, Paul Atkins told a crowd Monday.

item.title: Bitcoin drops toward $68,000 as demand weakens and whales sell
item.description: Glassnode data shows soft participation, while a negative gamma setup below $68,000 leaves BTC exposed to a faster move toward $60,000.

item.title: Chaos Labs taps out as Aave's risk provider, decision ‘not made in haste’
item.description: DeFi risk manager Chaos Labs said Aave’s planned migration to Aave V4 introduced risks that it wasn’t willing to assume, while Aave said Chaos wanted to take on full control as the sole risk service provider.

item.title: 🇺🇸 TODAY: SEC Chair Paul Atkins says the crypto safe harbor proposal has advanced to White House review, with a formal rule expected shortly. The proposal includes a "startup exemption" allowing crypto projects to raise capital without immediate registrati - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBIS2ZUTjJYUU1CZGRJU2NRdzR1TXliOVBRUy1NV0p4b0JUMThsd1FIMmlJZnNOUUNQUzcyX2JJMjU4RGxHTHBUNGdlR2R1cTVoOVJVWExXc2NleV8yOG56T2VDcms?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 TODAY: SEC Chair Paul Atki…

item.title: Jamie Dimon Says AI Will Impact 'Virtually Every Function' at JPMorgan Chase
item.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon said that the rate of AI adoption "will likely be far faster than prior technological transformations."

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Polymarket drops USDC.e for USDC-backed token in exchange overhaul
item.description: Polymarket is upgrading its exchange infrastructure in the coming weeks, introducing new contracts and a USDC-backed token while phasing out a bridged stablecoin.

item.title: ⚡️ LATEST: Bitcoin’s 30-day average transaction fees have dropped to 2.5 BTC per day, the lowest level since 2011, signaling weak on-chain demand. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9XUktYY1ROOGVJem1rVFQ5Zm9kS2FCZXV6M3d2cjdlZ2dhWDQ3TlhVMWlXdW1vMHFoUmhSUnY1N29WczI3Rnk3dlUyUDRhaHVsakhSeHdFdGJEaUxSV0FDRDZnS0Q?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ LATEST: Bitcoin’s 30-day ave…

item.title: Bitcoin may hit $110K as Strategy absorbs nearly 3x new BTC supply
item.description: Bitcoin may invalidate its bear flag setup as Strategy buys 46,233 BTC in just over a month, outpacing the 16,200 BTC supply in the same period.

item.title: Polymarket to Launch Stablecoin, Order Book Overhaul in Prediction Market Upgrade
item.description: Polymarket is overhauling its technical foundations and launching a stablecoin as it aims to improve the user experience and order book.

item.title: US appeals court upholds preventing New Jersey enforcement against Kalshi
item.description: As states seek to regulate prediction markets, a panel of federal judges ruled in favor of Kalshi’s position that only the CFTC has jurisdiction.

item.title: Raising the Bar on Solana Ecosystem Security
item.description: Introducing STRIDE and Solana Incident Response Network

item.title: Bitcoin options market is quietly pricing a major downside move
item.description: Options data shows traders are bracing for a sharp bitcoin drop as weak demand and fragile positioning leave the market exposed to a break below key levels, a report from Bitfinex shows.

item.title: OpenAI Calls for Global Shift in Taxation, Labor Policy as AI Takes Over
item.description: A new OpenAI blueprint urges economic changes for the AI era as reporting raises questions about Altman’s motivations.

item.title: Tokenized Stocks Take Next Step With First On-Chain Vote for Galaxy Shareholders
item.description: Holders of tokenized shares in Galaxy (GLXY) will soon be able to participate in proxy voting on-chain via Broadridge.

item.title: JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon sees ‘new competitors’ from blockchain, stablecoins
item.description: The CEO's annual shareholder letter warned that new tech is reshaping finance, with tokenization and blockchain competitors gaining as the bank scales its own network.

item.title: Altcoin Resilience Signals 'Compelling Entry Points' for Crypto Markets: Grayscale
item.description: Altcoins like Ethereum and Solana have plunged from all-time highs, but their recent resilience is a compelling sign, according to Grayscale.

item.title: Solo Bitcoin Miner Beats the Odds, Scores $210K Block Reward
item.description: A solo miner with computing power equivalent to just 0.00002% of Bitcoin's network successfully mined a block last week.

item.title: Aave loses key risk manager, Chaos Labs, amid contributor exodus and disputes
item.description: A key sticking point is Aave’s V4 upgrade, which introduces a new architecture and significantly expands the scope of risk management.

item.title: US Senate Banking panel member confirms April timeline for crypto market structure
item.description: Acknowledging there is ”still a lot more work to do” before Congress can advance a market structure bill, Senator Bill Hagerty sees renewed attention starting next week.

item.title: Polymarket reveals a 'full exchange upgrade' to take control of its own trading and truth
item.description: The $20 billion prediction market is overhauling its infrastructure and launching a native stablecoin to streamline trading as it prepares for a major U.S. expansion.

item.title: Can Trump’s ultimatum to Iran push Bitcoin price back up to $75K?
item.description: While an Iran ceasefire favors stocks, Bitcoin’s path to $75,000 remains contingent on market trust despite Trump’s volatile diplomacy.

item.title: 'A Hurricane Coming': Bitcoin Could Fall to $10K This Year, Says Bloomberg Analyst
item.description: Bloomberg’s Mike McGlone argued that Bitcoin could fall as the crypto market purges market excesses that coincided with the pandemic-era boom.

item.title: JUST IN: Polymarket to launch 1:1 USDC-backed crypto collateral token. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5qN3ZlcVd2QkRYQm9jYUNfWFdPWDZWMlIxY3EtV0xJRGZpdFJTR3VMNXdnTmlQWUQ0dHBXSElWRUVEYTBtUG9nTGRtYVNFX3Vsa0VtdXJ1VUtLcjJaOGxLMWFR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Polymarket to launch 1:1 …

item.title: Bitcoin climbs above $70,000 as more contrarian bottoming signs emerge
item.description: Sales of bitcoin by prominent holders and executive exits could give hope to the battered crypto sector.

item.title: Figure Technology's tokenized credit platform could help double stock price: Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein says Figure may be undervalued as loan volumes surge and its tokenized credit platform expands, despite recent stock declines and market volatility.

item.title: Appeals court blocks New Jersey from shutting down Kalshi's sports markets
item.description: The Third Circuit Court of Appeals ruled that New Jersey could not bring an enforcement action against Kalshi, finding that the federal Commodity Exchange Act preempted state gambling laws.

item.title: Bitcoin profit-taking keeps BTC below $70K as Trump doubles down on Iran
item.description: Bitcoin found familiar resistance as it crossed the $70,000 mark to hit new April highs, with analysis blaming "profit-taking pressure."

item.title: 1/ @solana's Frontier Hackathon has commenced!🏔️ 🌍 Crypto's largest online startup competition 💰 $2.5 million from Colosseum's venture fund 🌉 Up to 10 startups accepted into our accelerator 🏁 Product submissions due by May 11, 2026 Join: colosseum.c - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBQSWRhMVJUQVlLVnFNTmxPNkhiNG81S2kzVHdwN0hwQ2R5bHNkQXpSclNuQXVsU1BPcHNINDhGU0loS1d4dWczanNiWnVKejM5eGlTQldwTU1UbktkeVZ3?oc=5" target="_blank">1/ @solana's Frontier Hackathon has co…

item.title: OpenAI CEO urges U.S. to prepare for AI ‘superintelligence’ risks and gains
item.description: The crypto industry faces growing cybersecurity risks as AI tools lower the cost and skill needed to exploit software flaws, with over $1.4 billion in assets stolen last year.

item.title: Circle’s Arc Network Reveals Quantum Resistance Plans as Bitcoin, Ethereum Face Threat
item.description: Circle’s upcoming Arc blockchain is gearing up for quantum resilience, revealing a multi-step roadmap to prepare for the looming threat.

item.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan must move faster as tokenization reshapes finance
item.description: “A whole new set of competitors is emerging based on blockchain," said Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders.

item.title: Kalshi Scores Biggest Legal Win Yet in Appeals Court Decision Against New Jersey
item.description: A panel of appellate judges ruled that Kalshi's sports wagers should be regulated by the CFTC, not state gambling regulators.

item.title: Price predictions 4/6: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Buyers are attempting to push Bitcoin above the $70,000 level, but some analysts believe the upside may be limited and a drop below the $60,000 support is likely.

item.title: IMF Warns Tokenized Finance, Stablecoins Could Amplify Financial Crises
item.description: Tokenization moves settlement to machine speed, outpacing the tools regulators use today, the International Monetary Fund said.

item.title: TOM LEE: ETHEREUM IS THE 2ND BEST ASSET SINCE THE WAR STARTED He also says: - War spending: $30B/month, heading to $100B - Every $10 in gas = only $4-5B/month consumer hit - Bitcoin #3 ... both beating equities outright - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE40Z2hPeUplZ25CSUE3Sl8zTXVrN1R6NGFHMUZwQUJwM2dHMmZ1WnVrdlNrOWVvQTJlVzR3MUVGR0FiX19SVmFVWjRrVWN3WnRhRGhwVTZvNEQ1STRiREZoM3dBVFQ?oc=5" target="_blank">TOM LEE: ETHEREUM IS THE 2ND BE…

item.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Nears 4% of Ethereum Supply as ETH Price Hits Weekly High
item.description: Publicly traded Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies added $150 million of ETH last week, boosting its $10.3 billion stash.

item.title: Solo bitcoin miner overcomes 1-in-28,000 odds to secure $210,000 block reward
item.description: The win landed the same week listed miners Riot, MARA, and Genius Group disclosed selling more than 19,000 BTC from their treasuries.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) jumps 8.1% over weekend
item.description: Avalanche (AVAX), up 5.5% since Friday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.

item.title: Strategy adds $330M BTC as paper losses top $14.5B in Q1
item.description: Strategy resumed Bitcoin purchases, acquiring 4,871 BTC for $329.9 million, while reporting a $14.46 billion unrealized loss and expanding its holdings.

item.title: Bitmine's ether treasury hits 4.8 million ETH as stock listing moves to NYSE
item.description: The company now holds 3.98% of all ether in circulation, has staked $7.1 billion of it, and says it is generating $196 million in annualized staking revenue.

item.title: 148A notices are now being issued to crypto investors in India. Many relate to FY 2021–22 transactions. If you traded back then, this thread could save you from a serious tax problem 🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5lV0tBSWowbUtQVmtGb2E4alJvc1ppSG96S3RMdVRlQk1pdnRmYmczWmwzWlhBaFdCNnh4dE01b04zbDZwZ1hBMWNyX0I1WDVoUUlCLV9fc0UtaUZvY1E?oc=5" target="_blank">148A notices are now being issued to cr…

item.title: New AI cybercrime tool targets crypto, bank KYC systems via deepfakes
item.description: A darknet threat actor is selling new fraud kit to trick KYC identity verification systems on financial platforms via AI-generated deepfakes and real-time voice altering.

item.title: 🇨🇳 BIG: China’s tax authority urges banks to use blockchain to boost SME lending and and reduce information gaps. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5zNndHS0NIdS1iUmVnakpqWE5YS2puR1ZxOFNLT25MdGx6MVJOdl80X1laZWR1MEJObWgwMXNSamM2Q0drMWMzdnJVRTByTko5UGQ0SG5WY2VuOGZGX0p2Qkk1Y1A?oc=5" target="_blank">🇨🇳 BIG: China’s tax authority…
